packaging.material: Jute bags or woven PP bags

grades.Export Quality: Uniform size, zero sap burn, zero fruit fly marks, firmness > 8 lbs
grades.Standard: Slight size variance allowed, no active pest damage

packaging.weight_marking: Net weight usually 2kg, 3kg, or 5kg depending on market
packaging.treatment: Hot Water Treatment (HWT) required for EU, UAE, Iran
